steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for a generalization about the Hina Hanta archive — a broad claim about the archive itself, not a single specific fact.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Included in the Hina Hanta online archive is a cloth shawl.: Reports one specific artifact. That is a single fact, not a generalization. ✗
  • Choice B — The Choctaw name for the cloth shawl is anchi.: Reports a specific vocabulary detail about one item. Not a generalization. ✗
  • Choice C — Not all artifacts in the Hina Hanta archive are from the 1800s.: Draws on both dates from the notes (1881 and 1915) to make a broad claim about the archive's temporal scope. This is a generalization. ✓
  • Choice D — The clay mug (isht ishko) was made in 1915.: Reports a single specific fact about one artifact. Not a generalization. ✗
That is the correct answer.
